tool.name: wayback_fetcher
tool.description: Fetch historical URLs from the Wayback Machine.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Get archived URLs for a domain - Search for URLs matching a pattern - Get available snapshots for a specific URL - Filter by file type (js, json, xml, php, api, config, backup)

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The fetch action: - fetch: Get archived URLs for a domain - search: Search for URLs matching a pattern - snapshots: Get available snapshots for a specific URL

parameter.name: domain
parameter.description: Target domain to fetch URLs for. Required for fetch, search.

parameter.name: url
parameter.description: Specific URL to get snapshots for. Required for snapshots.

parameter.name: file_type
parameter.description: Filter by file type: js, json, xml, php, asp, jsp, api, config, backup

parameter.name: pattern
parameter.description: Regex pattern to search for. Required for search.

returns.description: Discovered URLs, snapshots, and metadata from the Wayback Machine

tool.examples:
# Fetch archived URLs
fetch example.com
# Fetch JavaScript files
fetch example.com js
# Search for API endpoints
search example.com api
# Get snapshots
snapshots https://example.com/page.html
